hooks.command: cmd="$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty')"; case "$cmd" in *"git push"*":main"*|*"git push"*":refs/heads/main"*|*"git push"*" main"|*"git push"*" main "*) echo "BLOCKED: pushing to 'main' is not allowed. Open a PR instead." >&2; exit 2 ;; esac; case "$cmd" in *"git commit"*|*"git push"*|*"git merge"*|*"git rebase"*|*"git cherry-pick"*|*"git revert"*|*"git am"*|*"git -c "*" commit"*|*"git -c "*" push"*|*"git -C "*" commit"*|*"git -C "*" push"*) branch="$(git -C "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" symbolic-ref --short HEAD 2>/dev/null)"; if [ -z "$branch" ]; then echo "BLOCKED: cannot determine current branch; refusing commit/push (fail-closed). Server-side branch protection on 'main' is the authoritative guard." >&2; exit 2; fi; if [ "$branch" = "main" ]; then echo "BLOCKED: 'main' is a protected branch. Create a feature branch (git switch -c feat/...) and open a PR instead." >&2; exit 2; fi ;; esac; exit 0
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; case "$f" in *.ts) npx biome check --write "$f";; esac; } 2>/dev/null || true
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | grep -q '\.ts$' && npx tsc --noEmit || true
